cleavage agent: 1 μg trypsin/per 50 μg protein, incubated at 37 °C for 20 h
instrument: Mass spectrometric analysis Q-Exactive (Thermo Finnigan, San Jose, CA, USA)
labeling: comprehensive analysis of the proteins that make up scales provides crucial information for an understanding of the process of scale formation.
reduction reagent: 8 M Urea/100 mM DTT in PBS
reduction concentration: 8 M Urea/100 mM DTT in PBS
